Hudson Member of Parliament for Epping Forest In Parliament Tweet Here you can see Neil Hudson's latest speeches and appearances in Parliament: News Epping Forest MP Dr Neil Hudson backs plan to scrap Northern Ireland Troubles Bill Tuesday, 28 April, 2026 Last night (27 April) in the House of Commons Dr Neil Hudson MP voted against the Labour Government’s carry-over motion on the Northern Ireland Troubles Bill, supporting the Conservative plan to scrap the legislation if they are returned to Government.Dr Hudson’s vote reflects gr Epping Forest MP Dr Neil Hudson holds Labour Government to account in Budget speech Wednesday, 3 December, 2025 This week in the Commons, Member of Parliament for Epping Forest, Dr Neil Hudson, called out this year’s Budget for raising taxes while failing to deliver the vital services relied on for workers and employers in Epping Forest on issues like healthcare and transport services.In his speech in the 202 Veterinary MP shows his support for assistance dogs in Parliament Tuesday, 2 December, 2025 In Parliament, Dr Neil Hudson MP, Shadow DEFRA Minister and Member of Parliament for Epping Forest, showed his support for assistance dogs and the invaluable lifeline they provide for those who need on them, at a cross party Parliamentary event.The event, hosted by Assistance Dogs UK (ADUK), Assista Epping Forest MP repeats calls for Government to take accountability on mistaken prison release and to close the Bell Hotel immediately Tuesday, 11 November, 2025 Today in Parliament, Epping Forest MP Dr Neil Hudson demanded the Government remember they are ‘players not political commentators’ in the fiasco regarding the mistaken prisoner release of former Bell Hotel resident Hadush Kebatu, and that they should use their powers to close the Bell Hotel immedia Epping Forest MP teams up with football legend Harry Redknapp to raise greater Sepsis Awareness for World Sepsis Day 2025 Friday, 12 September, 2025 Dr Neil Hudson, MP for Epping Forest, attended an event in Parliament ahead of World Sepsis Day on Saturday 13th September, supporting the All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) on Sepsis and The UK Sepsis Trust to push for greater awareness of sepsis and its signs.Sepsis is life-threatening Shadow Environment Minister tells Government: Tackle Water Company Borrowing Thursday, 11 September, 2025 In the House of Commons, Shadow Environment Minister Dr Neil Hudson MP urged the Labour Government to save consumers and the taxpayer from the fallout of financial issues of companies like Thames Water, by introducing limits on their borrowing levels, during Oral Parliamentary Questions to the Depar Dr Neil Hudson MP joins the Farm Safety Foundation to promote Farm Safety Week in Parliament Tuesday, 22 July, 2025 Shadow DEFRA Minister Dr Neil Hudson MP took the opportunity in Parliament to champion Farm Safety Week, meeting with the Farm Safety Foundation (Yellow Wellies), to urgently call for change to keep our farmers safe at their parliamentary event in advance of Farm Safety Week.Farm Safety Week is an a Dr Neil Hudson MP celebrates campaign win with 3 Dads Walking on suicide prevention in the school curriculum Wednesday, 16 July, 2025 This week, Dr Neil Hudson, MP for Epping Forest, celebrated the major campaign win with the 3 Dads Walking to see safe, age-appropriate lessons on suicide prevention be introduced in the secondary school curriculum in England.Just this week, the Government published new statutory guidance for school Epping Forest MP champions vital access to life-extending treatments for Secondary Breast Cancer Friday, 11 July, 2025 This month, Dr Neil Hudson, MP for Epping Forest, supported Breast Cancer Now’s #MoreTimetoLive campaign, which shines a spotlight on difficulties facing those living with secondary breast cance
